hero.title: FP-98 Large Fixed Wing UAV
hero.subtitle: Double 1000, Double 100, Double 10 Unmanned Transport Aircraft Products for trunk, branch, and terminal line scenarios.

items.title: Civil Logistic
items.desc: Provides systematic solutions for typical operation scenarios such as trunk logistics, branch logistics and terminal logistics.

items.title: Emergency Rescue
items.desc: Innovate the UAVs emergency rescue mode. Build an intelligent three-dimensional rescue system. Provide systematic solutions for different disaster scenarios.

items.title: Industry Service
items.desc: A complete operational system for flight carrying. Provide customers with services such as operation, testing, and carrying of various models.

items.title: Forest & Grassland Fire Prevention
items.desc: Comprehensive forest and grassland fire prevention system including daily patrol, fire monitoring, fire scene reconnaissance, and emergency communications support.

items.title: Double 1000 Series
items.subtitle: Trunk Line
items.desc: Drone Systems for Trunk Line Scenarios with 1000 km Range and 1000 kg Load.

items.title: Double 100 Series
items.subtitle: Branch Line
items.desc: Drone Systems for Branch Line Scenarios with 100 km Range and 100 kg Load.

items.title: Double 10 Series
items.subtitle: Terminal Line
items.desc: Drone Systems for Terminal Line Scenarios with 10 km Range and 10 kg Load.

items.title: Ground Control Station
items.subtitle: Command & Control
items.desc: The Ground Control Station processes tasks through a control console, data link, or satellite communication. Include handheld control terminal, portable control terminal, shelter control station, etc.

items.title: Operation Control System
items.subtitle: Fleet Management
items.desc: The Operation Control System can provide real-time data such as drone nameplates, situational information, and flight status, and perform artificial control operations such as airspace application and flight mission execution.

items.title: Systematic Solution
items.desc: Provide scenario-level solutions for industry users in relevant countries and regions around the world

items.title: Complete Product Layout
items.desc: Full product lineup of 11+ UAV models covering trunk, branch, and terminal line scenarios

items.title: 10W+ Flight Time
items.desc: Over 100,000 hours of accumulated flight time with proven safety and reliability records

items.title: Airworthiness Certification
items.desc: Full type certificate and airworthiness compliance certification for civil UAV operations

training.title: Training Center
training.subtitle: Civil UAV pilot training institution certified by the China Association of Aircraft Owners and Pilots (AOPA).

pilotCenter.title: Pilot Training Center
pilotCenter.desc: A civil unmanned aerial vehicle pilot training institution (Class III multi rotor) certified by the China Association of Aircraft Owners and Pilots (AOPA) can provide theoretical and practical training for Class III multi rotor in line of sight pilots and Class III multi rotor over line of sight pilots.

aopa.title: AOPA Certification Exam
aopa.desc: Humanized course arrangement, with off duty classes and weekend classes, suitable for different working groups to register. Class management system, where each class is managed by a dedicated person and each student's study and rest time is reasonably arranged. Experienced mentors in practical projects, allowing students to quickly understand the application of drones in practical projects. High pass rate, with a multi rotor drone pilot class pass rate of 88%-90%.

cta.title:
Aerospace Technology
Makes Life Better
cta.subtitle: Providing scenario-level solutions for industry users with unmanned system technology, promoting the transformation of transportation from two-dimensional to three-dimensional mode.
